expectedIssues: Casino icon design/layout is broken in the bottom nav bar
reportedIssues: Several game cards in the right column are partially cut off by the viewport edge, making the layout look broken or horizontally overflowing.
The top category navigation is clipped on the right side; the 'Hot Ga...' tab is only partially visible.
The bottom fixed navigation overlaps the lower game thumbnails, cutting into the visible content area at the bottom of the screen.
Some carousel and card edge elements are very close to the viewport boundary, including the hero carousel arrow on the right and partially visible thumbnails, making the page feel cramped.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a broken casino icon design/layout in the bottom nav bar; they address other layout issues like clipping in the right column, top navigation, and bottom nav overlap, but not the casino icon specifically.
